allow: Bash(python3.12 -m venv venv && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(python3.12 -c "
import ast, pathlib
changed_files = [
    'academies/views.py',
    'athletes/views.py',
    'techniques/views.py',
    'matches/views.py',
    'attendance/views.py',
    'attendance/services.py',
    'attendance/selectors.py',
    'attendance/serializers.py',
    'tatami/views.py',
    'membership/services.py',
    'athletes/models.py',
    'core/permissions.py',
    'config/urls.py',
    'config/throttles.py',
    'academies/tests/test_api.py',
    'athletes/tests/test_api.py',
    'techniques/tests/test_api.py',
    'matches/tests/test_api.py',
    'attendance/tests/test_security.py',
]
all_ok = True
for f in changed_files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(pathlib.Path\(f\).read_text\(\)\)
        print\(f'OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'ERR {f}: {e}'\)
        all_ok = False
print\('All syntax OK' if all_ok else 'SYNTAX ERRORS FOUND'\)
")
